queries.compiledQueryString:
select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
order by state
queries.inputQueryString:
select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
order by state

queries.compiledQueryString:
select
    id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    state,
    old_party,
    new_party,
    switched_at
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '${inputs.state_filter.value}'
order by switched_at desc
queries.inputQueryString:
select
    id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    state,
    old_party,
    new_party,
    switched_at
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '${inputs.state_filter.value}'
order by switched_at desc

queries.compiledQueryString:
select
    old_party || ' → ' || new_party as party_change,
    count(*) as num_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '${inputs.state_filter.value}'
group by old_party, new_party
order by num_voters desc
queries.inputQueryString:
select
    old_party || ' → ' || new_party as party_change,
    count(*) as num_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '${inputs.state_filter.value}'
group by old_party, new_party
order by num_voters desc
